chemical_id.description: Stable chemical identifier shared with the request.
chemical_id.title: Chemical Id

preferred_name.description: Preferred chemical name when the ConsExpo source is already tied to identity.
preferred_name.title: Preferred Name

productGroup.description: ConsExpo product-group family such as cosmetics or pest_control_products.
productGroup.title: Productgroup

productSubgroup.description: Optional narrower ConsExpo subgroup or scenario label.
productSubgroup.title: Productsubgroup

modelFamily.description: Optional ConsExpo model family such as spray or direct_application.
modelFamily.title: Modelfamily

supportedRoutes.description: Routes explicitly supported by the cited ConsExpo source.
supportedRoutes.title: Supportedroutes

physical_forms.description: Physical forms supported by the ConsExpo source.
physical_forms.title: Physical Forms

application_methods.description: Application methods supported by the ConsExpo source.
application_methods.title: Application Methods

retention_types.description: Retention or contact semantics supported by the ConsExpo source.
retention_types.title: Retention Types

region_scopes.description: Regions where the ConsExpo evidence is considered applicable.
region_scopes.title: Region Scopes

jurisdictions.description: Jurisdictions or programs where the ConsExpo evidence is relevant.
jurisdictions.title: Jurisdictions

physchem_summary.description: Optional physicochemical context preserved from the ConsExpo source.
physchem_summary.title: Physchem Summary

evidence_sources.description: Stable upstream evidence references backing the ConsExpo record.
evidence_sources.title: Evidence Sources

notes.description: Additional notes preserved from the ConsExpo source.
notes.title: Notes

evidence.description: Typed ConsExpo evidence record to map into the generic evidence contract.
